docket_entries.description: MISCELLANEOUS CIVIL SPECIAL SETTING CALENDAR OF MAY-21-2025 - SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL ASSIGNED TO SMALL CLAIM APPEALS ON MAY-21-2025 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 502, JUDGE VICTOR HWANG. (206)
MINI MINUTES FOR MAY-21-25 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 502
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF MAY-21-2025 - TRIAL DE NOVO HELD AND THE MATTER IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-21-2025 BY VICTOR M. HWANG CLERK DENNIS VEGAS, NOT REPORTED (502)
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF MAY-21-2025 - JUDGMENT ENTERED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT BALTODANO, JANIO RECOVER FROM APPELLANT PEREZ, CESAR $1,850.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,915.00, MR BALTODANO TO PROVIDE AN ITEMIZED RECIEPT TO MR.PERRY. MR. PERRY TO PAY WITHIN 30 DAY OR INTEREST ACCRUES AT LEGAL RATE. SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
